_instructions: Phase 3 site-wide SEO + conversion upgrade for iNHYPE. For each service route below, merge into src/seo/seo-data.json and update ServicePage.tsx rendering: (1) set the page H1 to the 'h1' value (keyword-rich, geo) and DEMOTE the page's current creative tagline to a sub-headline directly under the H1 (keep the eyebrow/category label above it, same style as the Endosphère and Russian Manicure pages). (2) If a 'pricing' array is present, render a pricing block identical in style to the Endosphère/Russian Manicure/HydraFacial pricing block (menu rows, right-aligned gold price, 'Individual results vary' style note where appropriate, a BOOK NOW CTA). (3) Add to each priced page's existing Service JSON-LD an 'offers'/'hasOfferCatalog' built from the pricing rows AND 'areaServed' = Redondo Beach, Manhattan Beach, Hermosa Beach, Torrance, Palos Verdes (same shape as the Endosphère page). Do NOT change titles, meta descriptions, canonicals, FAQ content, /services, /booking, the Square widget, or invent any price not listed here. endosphere-body-sculpting and russian-manicure are already done — do not touch them. Prices are real (from the live Square booking).

hydrafacial._note: Pricing already published on this page — keep it. Only fix the H1 (currently the tagline) and ensure offers+areaServed are in the schema.

peptide-therapy._note: No confirmed price — do NOT add a pricing block or invent prices. H1 fix only.
